characters.name: Al-Ice
characters.description: Al-Iceis a character featured inMartha's dreams in the episode "Verb Dog, When Action Calls!". Her name is a cross betweenAlice Boxwoodand "ice" due to her ice powers. She does not exist in the show's "reality". Al-Ice looks just like Alice Boxwood except she wears navy blue boots and matching fingerless gloves, a light blue jumpsuit with lighter-blue patterns in the shape of icicles on the neck and thighs. Her suit has pale-blue woolly ruffs on the neck, cuffs and foot holes. She wears a navy blue belt with a white buckle. She also has on a light blue helmet with the icicle pattern and navy blue goggles. She can leap more than twice her own height. She can also shoot ice out of her gloves, hence her name. Most of the time, she can control when she does it, but when she laughs, she does it uncontrollably.

characters.name: Alfred Abbott
characters.description: Alfred "Al" Abbottis the alphabetician who makes the letter A for the alphabet soupMarthaeats. He is laid off whenGranny Flodecides to cut costs by getting rid of half the letters for the soup, but gets it back after he shares his last can of complete alphabet soup with Martha, who scares Granny Flo into giving everyone back their jobs. He is generally calm and laid back but can get nervous and was confused when he learned Martha could speak. Martha Lorraine•Skits Lorraine•Helen Lorraine•Mariella Lorraine•Daniel Lorraine•Carolina Lorraine•Alice Boxwood•Truman Oatley•Tyrone Daniel "T.D." Kennelly

characters.name: Alice Boxwood
characters.description: Alice Kathy BoxwoodInfomationGenderFemaleAge10FamilyNewt Boxwood(father)Phyllis Boxwood(mother)Ronald Boxwood(brother)Peter Boxwood (Twin Brother)Chester "Chet" Boxwood (brother)Nelson Boxwood(pet)Polly Boxwood(pet)OtherVoice ActorChristina Crivici (Seasons 1 to 3)Michelle Creber (Season 4)Ashlyn Drummond (Season 5)First Appearance (cartoon)Martha Speaks Alice is complete klutz. She (formerly secretly) wants to be a ballet dancer (in addition to liking watching ballet), and she has started taking lessons. She also likes to do sports like ice hockey and is very energetic. She is quite perky and cheerful but sometimes she can be stubborn or moody, especially when she is mad at someone (often atRonald).

characters.name: Bernard Lorraine
characters.description: "Bernie(Dad's Dad) is a funny guy who thinks Martha is tops. He's Martha's great supporter behind the scenes and helps smooth over misunderstandings between Martha and Lucille." -description from PBS website--> Bernard "Bernie" LorraineisDaniel's father. He once lostLucille's keys, bent her skies, and sold Lucille's chair for a big grizzly bear. He is quite fun-loving but sometimes gets aches due to his age. He is otherwise in good health and likesMarthaa lot. He knows how to fish.

characters.name: Big Minnie
characters.description: Big Minnieis a large Opossume that lives in the forest around Flea Lake. She is known byMartha, but to everyone else she is a Urban legend, a myth. Her exact physical appearance is shady because we only see some portions of her.Ronaldtried to scareAlice,Helen, and the dogs by pretending to be Big Minnie. Outside of the animals, the only human who knows that Big Minnie is real isCarolina. characters.name: Bob
characters.description: BobTV showBooksInfomationGenderMaleAnimalDogFamilyBob's owner(owner)OtherFirst Appearance (cartoon)"Martha Walks the Dog"First Appearance (books)Martha Walks the Dog (book)  Bobis a dog that moves in withhis ownerin "Martha Walks the Dog." He originally barked a lot and was a mean dog, butMarthalater figured out that he was only doing that because his owner was being mean to him. When receiving nice comments, he is a very tame dog. InWhat's Bothering Bob?, he goes berserk and chasesTrumanall over town. Soon Truman,Helen,Alice,TD,Kazuothe dog officer, the pizza guy, and Bob's owner are all up a tree by that vicious dog. It turns out he is being wild because of a loud high-pitched sound is bothering him.

characters.name: Bob's Owner
characters.description: JimInfomationGenderMaleFamilyBob(pet)OtherFirst Appearance (cartoon)"Martha Walks the Dog"First Appearance (books)Martha Walks the Dog (book)  Bob's Ownermoves into a house near the Lorraine residence with his dog,Bob, in the episode "Martha Walks the Dog." He had always yelled at Bob, saying "Bad dog, Bob!", butMarthalater figured out that if Bob receives nice comments for behaving, he is much tamer, so Bob's owner began giving Bob more positive comments.

characters.name: Canine 001
characters.description: Canine 001is the code name (real name unknown) of an intimidating Rottweiler that was the antagonist of "Martha: Secret Agent Dog". A man made Martha protect the soup recipe from being stolen and made Canine 001 her partner. Unknown to Martha, both the man and his dog were trying to steal the soup recipe and Canine 001 gave Martha the recipe and she spread it to the man, thinking it was a code. Later, Martha had a dream about theCome On Innand caught and arrested the crooks at the Come On Inn, knowing they'd be there as she recognized the sausage smell on Canine 001's breath as coming from there.

characters.name: Carolina Lorraine
characters.description: Carolina LorraineTeenChildRough Collie formInfomationGenderFemaleAnimalHumanAge12-13HomeHelen Lorraine(cousin)Martha Lorraine(cousin's dog)Skits Lorraine(cousin's dog)Daniel Lorraine(uncle)Mariella Lorraine(aunt)Jake Lorraine(cousin)Jorge(father)OtherVoice ActorVanesa TomasinoFirst Appearance (cartoon)Martha Speaks Carolina is girly and self-centered, sometimes bossy, she thinks that she can sing very well (which most other characters think is untrue) and she sometimes has stage fright when acting. She also likes a few sports (mostly hockey and football). She can also speak Spanish. Despite the fact that she can be rather vain, Carolina is loyal, honest, and considerate towards others. She's particularly supportive and helpful needed, and she is also quite thankful whenever others help her out. She has also stated that as editor of the Town Crier newspaper, she'd rather not make up stories or go against someone's right and desire for privacy. For instance, despite finding out thatBig Minnieis real, she ultimately decided to keep the monster's existence a secret after realizing what would happen if she published the story. As her Rough Collie form in "Dog Daze", kept a bit of a human way of thinking after the transformation, but over time she began to succumb to her animal instincts.

characters.name: Cecilia
characters.description: Cecilia(who is nicknamed Cissy) is a character who appears inThe Mystery of the Missing Dinosaur. Cissy looks like a female version ofTD, with long, curly blonde hair and a pink t-shirt with a strawberry on it, similar to TD's tomato shirt. She also wears a blue skirt, pink socks, and pink flats. In The Mystery of the Missing Dinosaur, Cissy was walking home from her Spanish lessons when she happened to stumble across TD's toy dinosaur, which had coincidentally flew in her direction. Cissy wanted to know where the dinosaur had come from, so she contacts the weather bureau for the wind direction that day. From that information, she determines the location the dinosaur had flew from: TD's house.

characters.name: Celeste
characters.description: Celeste(pronounced sell-est-ay) is a minor character who attendsWagstaff City Elementary School. She is often seen in the background but has very few lines. She could also possibly be the owner ofBertas she was seen walking him in the background of "Martha Hears". Celeste is quite tall with average build and a complexion similar to that ofMilo Lee. She has long, black, straight hair, a baby blue jacket, a yellow shirt, brown shoes and baggy baby pink pants. characters.name: Cookie
characters.description: Cookieis a minor character inMartha Speaks. He only appears in "Get Along, Little Dogies!". Cookie is short-tempered, tough, and quite calm at times. He acts stern, just like a real cowboy. Just like a real cowboy, he has a hat, boots, gloves, pants, bright colored shirts, and a scarf. He also has a pretty long beard too. Cookie is short-tempered, tough, and quite calm at times. He acts stern, just like a real cowboy.

characters.name: Courageous Collie Carlo
characters.description: Courageous Collie Carlois a fictional hero in a show named after him. He saves the day from all sorts of disasters such as tornados. In real life, the actor (a real-life Collie) that plays him, who is also named Carlo, is scared of flowers because one time, behind the scenes, flowers made him sneeze, blowing them onto two peoples' faces, leading the people to spill a vat of glue all over him. He has a TV series named after him and many movies, some that have not been released on TV, and also has a collar named after him.Marthadescribes him as handsome.
